sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ وَتَوَجَّهْتُ مُبَاشَرَةً إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الِاسْتِقْبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam u hotel i odmah otišao na recepciju.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at the hotel and went straight to the reception desk.

sentences.translation: Dao sam službenici svoje ime i broj rezervacije.
sentences.translationEn: I gave the staff member my name and booking number.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتْ مِنِّي بِطَاقَةَ هُوِيَّتِي وَبِطَاقَةَ الدَّفْعِ.
sentences.translation: Tražila je moju ličnu kartu i karticu za plaćanje.
sentences.translationEn: She asked for my ID card and payment card.

sentences.arabic: سَلَّمَتْنِي مِفْتَاحَ الْغُرْفَةِ وَشَرَحَتْ لِي مَوَاعِيدَ الْإِفْطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Predala mi je ključ sobe i objasnila radno vrijeme doručka.
sentences.translationEn: She handed me the room key and explained the breakfast times.

sentences.arabic: الْغُرْفَةُ فِي الطَّابِقِ الثَّالِثِ وَالْمَنْظَرُ مِنْهَا جَمِيلٌ.
sentences.translation: Soba je na trećem spratu i pogled iz nje je lijep.
sentences.translationEn: The room is on the third floor and the view from it is beautiful.
